# UX Checklist: Search by Address in the Map UI

**Purpose**: Validate search UX, guidance, and map behavior.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/024-address-map-search/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Search Experience

- [x] CHK-UX-001 Search bar is visible, enabled, and has helper text.
- [x] CHK-UX-002 Autocomplete suggestions appear with ranking and confidence when available.
- [x] CHK-UX-003 Loading indicator appears while suggestions are fetched.

## Resolution & Guidance

- [x] CHK-UX-004 Successful resolve pans/zooms and drops a marker.
- [x] CHK-UX-005 Ambiguous results show candidate list and wait for user selection.
- [x] CHK-UX-006 No-results message leaves map unchanged and suggests alternatives.
- [x] CHK-UX-007 Out-of-coverage warning leaves map unchanged.
- [x] CHK-UX-008 Geocoding outage shows retryable message without infinite loading.

## Consistency & Accessibility

- [x] CHK-UX-009 Labels align with shared naming conventions ("Search", "Suggestions", "Region not supported").
- [x] CHK-UX-010 Basic accessibility pass (keyboard navigation + contrast) is part of UX gate.
